title: Welcome to jueunbonalee
text:
Welcome to the refreshed version of my blog. I’ll be sharing data science content here in both English and Korean.
Stay tuned for posts on:

Machine learning tutorials

title: jueunbonalee
text:
I’m currently based in Madrid, Spain, and pursuing a Master’s degree in Computational Social Science at Universidad Carlos III de Madrid.
Before returning to academia, I worked as a digital marketing strategist for startups across different parts of the world. That journey led me to a deeper interest in how data can help us understand people, society, and decision-making.
Today, I’m focusing on data analysis, data science, and machine learning. I’m especially interested in combining computational methods with social questions to generate insights that are both analytical and human-centered.
This blog is a space for sharing my projects, reflections, and ongoing learning at the intersection of data, technology, and society.

GitHub LinkedIn
